Dish Tried: Oat milk latte and avocado toast
Taste Notes: Toast came with olive oil not butter, clean and bright flavor, beautiful plating on slate board

Dish Tried: Grilled octopus with smoked paprika aioli (aioli on side)
Taste Notes: Charred edges, great texture, smoky and tender, aioli skipped and still outstanding

Dish Tried: Oat milk cortado and granola bowl
Taste Notes: Granola with coconut milk instead of cream, crunchy and not too sweet

Dish Tried: Har gow, turnip cake, steamed chicken feet
Taste Notes: Turnip cake fried in shared oil with egg dishes, har gow pure shrimp and clean, chicken feet deeply savory

Dish Tried: Shio ramen, rye noodle bowl, vegetable gyoza
Taste Notes: Asked about dairy, server confirmed broth is clean. Gyoza might share fryer. Noodles have incredible chew.

Dish Tried: Oat milk latte
Taste Notes: Perfect extraction today, creamy and balanced

Dish Tried: Black bean tacos with pickled onion and avocado
Taste Notes: Bright and fresh, good char on the tortilla, guac made in-house with just lime and salt

Dish Tried: Char siu bao steamed, turnip cake, rice noodle rolls
Taste Notes: Steamed bao clean but baked version has butter glaze. Rice noodle rolls confirmed no dairy.

Dish Tried: Oat latte and banana bread
Taste Notes: Banana bread has butter, skipped that, latte on point as usual

Dish Tried: Grain bowl with roasted cauliflower and tahini dressing
Taste Notes: Entirely plant-based restaurant, completely dairy-free safe, tahini dressing rich and nutty

Dish Tried: Shrimp dumpling soup, taro cake, soy-braised pork belly
Taste Notes: Broth clear and clean, taro cake fried but confirmed no dairy, pork belly soy-based

Dish Tried: Mafaldine with pink peppercorn and parmigiano (observed only, did not eat)
Taste Notes: Cheese central to almost every dish, very hard to eat dairy-free here. Beautiful to shoot though.

Dish Tried: Oat latte and chia pudding
Taste Notes: Chia pudding made with oat milk and coconut, clean and simple

Dish Tried: Roasted carrot salad with pistachios and citrus
Taste Notes: Asked kitchen directly, no dairy in the carrot dish, dressing was citrus-based, very clean flavors

Dish Tried: Egg tart (shared), chive and shrimp dumpling, sticky rice in lotus leaf
Taste Notes: Egg tart has butter pastry. Skipped. The sticky rice lotus leaf parcel was clean and filling.

Dish Tried: Oat milk latte and tahini cookie
Taste Notes: Cookie confirmed dairy-free, tahini and oat base, not too sweet

Dish Tried: Vegetable tasting portion, roasted beet and walnut cream (cream on side)
Taste Notes: Walnut cream is dairy-free but rich, beautiful earthy dish, greenhouse setting stunning

Dish Tried: Turnip cake, congee with ginger and scallion, shrimp dumpling
Taste Notes: Congee confirmed no dairy, ginger and scallion version clean and warming, great on a cold Sunday

Dish Tried: Ceviche leche de tigre, causa with aji amarillo
Taste Notes: Leche de tigre has no dairy, causa had no cream filling this version, great fresh acidity

Dish Tried: Oat latte and fruit plate
Taste Notes: Simple and clean, fruit plate seasonal

Dish Tried: Grilled king trumpet mushroom with herbs, roasted squash bowl
Taste Notes: Staff confirmed both dishes fully dairy-free, mushroom had great char, squash with olive oil and herbs

Dish Tried: Dim sum spread with focus on steamed items
Taste Notes: Staying with steamed only, safe and delicious, very relaxed brunch vibe with Mateo

Dish Tried: Fried rice with lap cheong and scallion, smashed cucumber salad
Taste Notes: Checked no dairy in the fried rice, lap cheong is pork sausage, clean and satisfying

Dish Tried: Shoyu ramen with extra noodles
Taste Notes: Shoyu broth confirmed dairy-free, soft egg added which is fine, noodles chewy and rich

Dish Tried: Oat latte, avocado toast
Taste Notes: Spring menu added radish and microgreens to the toast, even better now

Dish Tried: Sticky rice lotus leaf, shrimp rice noodle rolls, turnip cake
Taste Notes: Server confirmed lotus leaf parcel no dairy this prep, good morning for photography too

Dish Tried: Roasted beet tart with walnut crust, spring green salad
Taste Notes: Walnut crust confirmed vegan, beet sweet and earthy, salad with lemon vinaigrette

Dish Tried: Oat cortado and almond croissant (confirmed dairy-free batch)
Taste Notes: Bakery supplier does a dairy-free almond croissant twice a week, managed to catch one

Dish Tried: Grain bowl with falafel and tahini
Taste Notes: Confirmed fully dairy-free, falafel crispy and herbaceous, tahini generous

Dish Tried: Char siu noodle soup, taro dumpling steamed
Taste Notes: Noodle soup broth clean, taro dumpling confirmed no dairy in filling today

Dish Tried: Larb gai, charred eggplant with fish sauce, tom kha (without coconut cream, got the clear version)
Taste Notes: Tom kha clear broth version is dairy-free, larb confirmed no dairy, eggplant charred beautifully

Dish Tried: Oat latte and chia pudding with mango
Taste Notes: Summer fruit starting to appear on the menu

Dish Tried: Tostones with black bean dip, ceviche de camaron
Taste Notes: Both dishes confirmed dairy-free, ceviche light and citrusy, tostones perfectly crispy

Dish Tried: Har gow, turnip cake, rice congee with pork and century egg
Taste Notes: Congee pork and century egg preparation confirmed no dairy, rich and silky

Dish Tried: Mignonette oysters, clam chowder (skipped), grilled littlenecks with garlic
Taste Notes: Oysters on the half shell completely clean, clam chowder has cream so skipped, grilled clams great

Dish Tried: Oat latte and seasonal granola
Taste Notes: Granola rotating with rhubarb strawberry compote, stunning color for photography

Dish Tried: Spaghetti with sea urchin (skipped sea urchin butter component, had the plain pasta)
Taste Notes: Pasta without the sea urchin butter preparation is clean, excellent chew

Dish Tried: Shrimp and chive dumpling, lotus root with sweet soy, rice noodle rolls
Taste Notes: Lotus root dish confirmed no dairy, sweet soy and vinegar dressing only, crunchy and clean

Dish Tried: Roasted salmon with dill and cucumber, grain salad
Taste Notes: Salmon oil-roasted not butter, cucumber salad with rice vinegar, clean Scandinavian flavors

Dish Tried: Oat latte and avocado toast with radish
Taste Notes: Consistent as always, beautiful morning light at the window counter

Dish Tried: Roasted plantain with mole negro, jackfruit tostada
Taste Notes: Fully plant-based restaurant, mole negro deep and complex with multiple dried chiles, jackfruit shredded perfectly

Dish Tried: Char siu bao steamed, taro cake, soy braised tofu skin rolls
Taste Notes: Tofu skin rolls confirmed no dairy, char siu steamed bao always clean, beautiful for overhead photography

Dish Tried: Linguine with clams (skipped the pasta, tried the grilled branzino)
Taste Notes: Branzino grilled with olive oil and lemon, confirmed no butter, clean and perfectly cooked

Dish Tried: Shio ramen and sesame spinach side
Taste Notes: Spinach had sesame oil not dairy, shio ramen clean. One of the best ramen in the city.

Dish Tried: Iced oat latte and seasonal fruit bowl
Taste Notes: Summer menu fully in, stone fruit and berries, beautiful colors

Dish Tried: Har gow, lotus leaf sticky rice, soy sauce chicken
Taste Notes: Soy sauce chicken confirmed no dairy, lotus leaf parcel vegetable version this week

Dish Tried: Tostones, grilled shrimp skewers, mango salsa
Taste Notes: Full brand shoot day, also ate lunch here. Mango salsa bright and fresh. Shrimp skewers olive oil-based.

Dish Tried: Pizza margherita (observed, did not eat), arugula salad with lemon
Taste Notes: Arugula salad with lemon and olive oil confirmed no cheese, crisp and perfect. The pizza is gorgeous for photos.

Dish Tried: Iced oat latte
Taste Notes: Quick stop before Estrela summer reshoot

Dish Tried: Cheung fun with shrimp, turnip cake, har gow
Taste Notes: Cheung fun rice noodle confirmed no dairy today, silky with soy and sesame oil

Dish Tried: Whole fish with lemongrass and bird chile, papaya salad, crying tiger beef
Taste Notes: Server confirmed no dairy on any of the three dishes, fish steamed and fragrant, papaya salad assertive heat

Dish Tried: Shrimp dumpling soup, turnip cake, pork and crab soup dumpling
Taste Notes: Soup dumpling checked, pork and crab only, no dairy, very juicy and rich

Dish Tried: Watermelon salad with basil and sea salt, grilled corn with lime
Taste Notes: Summer menu is spectacular. Both dishes confirmed dairy-free. Corn charred and bright.

Dish Tried: Iced oat latte and cold brew float
Taste Notes: Oat milk cold brew float new summer special, rich and refreshing

Dish Tried: Al pastor, suadero, and nopales tacos
Taste Notes: All three confirmed no dairy. Al pastor from the trompo absolutely perfect. Nopales tangy and grassy.

Dish Tried: Congee with pork and thousand year egg, shrimp har gow, turnip cake
Taste Notes: Great Sunday spot, porridge rich and comforting even in summer

Dish Tried: Summer squash flatbread (olive oil base, no cheese), roasted tomato soup
Taste Notes: Server confirmed both items dairy-free, flatbread thin and crispy with herbs, tomato soup bright and acidic

Dish Tried: Iced oat cortado
Taste Notes: Busy Sunday, quick stop, reliable as always

Dish Tried: Dim sum tasting, steamed items only
Taste Notes: Keeping to the steamed side of the menu, safe and satisfying
